judgments.feedback_for_refinement: The rule ICDR_7_1_a has multiple issues: it is not atomic, loses the 50% threshold, and contains a hallucination about the name change requirement. The text in the extraction does not accurately reflect the original chunk text, which includes additional conditions and details.

The extraction does not capture the atomicity properly, as it only extracts one rule per entry. Fidelity is low due to loss of threshold (75%) and hallucination of the book-building condition. Completeness misses qualifiers. Maps_to fields are bare snake_case but the type_hint is missing. Source_alignment is bad due to long span_hint.

The rule ICDR_7_1_a has multiple issues: it is not atomic (should be split into multiple rules), it loses the threshold of 75% and the refund condition, and it hallucinates the book-building process requirement. The atomicity is violated because the rule text includes multiple conditions. Fidelity is low due to missing key elements like the 75% threshold and the refund obligation. Completeness is lacking as the rule does not include the book-building process condition. Maps_to_quality is poor due to incorrect field mapping. Source_alignment is not checked as the source text is not provided in the context.
